A message from Hong Kong to support Trump 2020
We are a group of Hongkongers from different classes. Last year, we have been through a lot of sorrowful moments facing the Chinese Communist Party(CCP). We are here to show our gratitude to President Trump and the Republican U.S. Government to support Hong Kong at this moment.
Under President Trump’s consistent and effective policy towards China, he called the whole world’s attention to the threat of the CCP. Maintaining the present strategy towards China is the safest way to prevent further infiltrations of the CCP.
We need President Trump to win the presidency.
Wish President Trump be re-elected in the 2020 election.
